
  sleep-after-claude
  Sleep your Mac when Claude Code finishes.
  ─────────────────────────────────────────

  Pre-flight scan
  Sleep readiness audit before goodnight releases caffeinate.
  ─────────────────────────────────────────
  Battery:         100% (AC Power)
  System sleep:    1 min
  State PID Process Assertion
  will release        123                 caffeinate          PreventUserIdleSystemSleep
  BLOCKS SLEEP        456                 zoom                PreventUserIdleSystemSleep

  ╭─ No active sleep blockers detected ─────────────────────╮
  │
  │   Releasing caffeinate will allow the Mac to sleep normally.
  │
  ╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
